title: Udon Prison Breaks Under Luffy’s Will
description: On pages 6–9, this part focuses on Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #8, Luffy, Queen as Luffy turns Udon prison into the rebellion’s first major victory while Big Mom and Queen throw the prison into chaos.
scene: Luffy turns Udon prison into the rebellion’s first major victory while Big Mom and Queen throw the prison into chaos.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Buho!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Wagh! My bad, gramps! I messed that up!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Don't die on me!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Gramps!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I- I managed to... guard myself with Rylo...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: So you're still alive, huh...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I won't forgive you! You ate it all...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The OSHIRU- Ko I was going to share!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: The thing I can teach you... (Qugh

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "Is the rylo that you cover the outside of your body with. In other words, Haki.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Oi! Don't talk! You'll die!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: It pro-tects you, much like invisible armor,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And it increases the strength of your attacks. A powerful ability!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: But, one level above that power...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Is the ability to have the Haki you've glad yourself in enter your enemy

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: And destroy them from the inside out!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: That is far more powerful!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: that steel collar from earlier...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You destroyed it from the inside out with your haki!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: You've already done this!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: You've already mastered

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Cladding the outside of your body in Haki.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: You just don't know it.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Gramps!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: NGHH!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: I won't forgive you!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Owagh!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Fight Well, straw hat!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Why can't we reach them?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Well... the boss small has disappeared somewhere!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And as if that's not enough of a problem,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What in the world is causing these tremors?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: WAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA AAAIT!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Aarr gghhh!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Big moon?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: She's destroyed the doors, and is headed into the prisoner's ironworks next door!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: That's where the blast furnace is!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: This is a huge problem!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But what should we do?! If even Lord Queen doesn't stand a chance against her....

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How can we ever hope to stop her?!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Wano Country is Lord Kaido's territory.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I am not sure if this is

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Lord Queen!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I won't let that old HAG have her way.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I've got a plan. We've got one shot. Listen closely, boys.

summary: This section advances the Wano - Udon Liberation storyline with 45 dialogue beats. Luffy turns Udon prison into the rebellion’s first major victory while Big Mom and Queen throw the prison into chaos.
